post.summary: Start a passkey login for a given username
post.description:
Start a passkey login for a given username

The account's passkeys are sent as the credential allow-list, so this
works with roaming authenticators (e.g. YubiKeys) whose credentials are
not client-side discoverable.

Finish a passkey login

Verifies the browser's credential and logs the account in.

get.summary: Log out of the current session
get.description: Log out of the current session

get.summary: Cheap probe whether the session is logged in
get.description: Cheap probe whether the session is logged in

get.summary: List the passkeys of the logged-in account
get.description: List the passkeys of the logged-in account

post.summary: Start adding another passkey to the logged-in account
post.description: Start adding another passkey to the logged-in account

post.summary: Finish adding another passkey to the logged-in account
post.description: Finish adding another passkey to the logged-in account

delete.summary: Delete one of the logged-in account's passkeys
delete.description:
Delete one of the logged-in account's passkeys

The last passkey cannot be deleted — the account would be locked out.

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`AccountPasskey`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

post.description:
Place a pre-order

Customers need no account: name plus phone or email is enough.
The pickup date is not chosen by the customer — every order is
for the next Saturday.

get.summary: Get an order by its pickup code
get.description:
Get an order by its pickup code

Deliberately does not echo phone/email: the code is a weak bearer
secret, so a guessed code must not leak contact data.

get.summary: List orders, optionally filtered by status and pickup date
get.description: List orders, optionally filtered by status and pickup date

schema.description: Only orders with this pickup date
Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Order`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

patch.description:
Change an order's status

Allowed transitions: `Open -> Ready -> PickedUp`; `Open | Ready -> Cancelled`.

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Order`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

patch.summary: Change a position's packed flag (packing list checkbox)
patch.description: Change a position's packed flag (packing list checkbox)

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`OrderItem`] model. To have better distinguishable types.
Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Category`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

delete.description:
Delete a category

Items of the category are kept (their category is set to null).

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Category`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

get.summary: List all items, including inactive ones
get.description: List all items, including inactive ones

put.description:
Update an item

Existing orders are unaffected: they carry name/price snapshots.

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Item`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

delete.description:
Delete an item

Positions of existing orders keep their snapshots (item link set to null).
Prefer deactivating items over deleting them.

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Item`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

put.description:
Set an item's product photo

Accepts jpeg/png/webp, downscales to a bounded size and stores
a re-encoded jpeg.

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Item`] model. To have better distinguishable types.
Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Item`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

post.summary: Create a staff account and return its one-time registration link
post.description: Create a staff account and return its one-time registration link

put.description:
Update a staff account

Admins cannot demote themselves — this avoids locking the last
admin out of account management.

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Account`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

delete.description:
Delete a staff account

Admins cannot delete themselves.

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Account`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

post.summary: Issue a new one-time registration link for an account ("lost device")
post.description: Issue a new one-time registration link for an account ("lost device")

schema.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Account`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

AccountPasskeyUuid.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`AccountPasskey`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

AccountSchema.description: A staff account as shown to admins

created_at.description: The point in time the account was created

last_login_at.description: The point in time when the account logged in recently

AccountUuid.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Account`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

AdminItem.description: An item as shown to admins (includes inactive items)

active.description: Whether the item is currently orderable

additional_info.description: Optional customer-facing details such as allergens or ingredients

category.description: The category the item belongs to

created_at.description: The point in time the item was created

image_version.description: Cache-busting version of the item's image, unset if there is none

ApiErrorResponse.description: The response that is sent in a case of an error the caller should report to an admin

trace_id.description: ID of the opentelemetry trace this error originated in

CategoryRequest.description: Request to create or update a category

CategoryUuid.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Category`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

CreateAccountRequest.description: Request to create a staff account

email.description: The customer's email address (this or `phone` must be set)

phone.description: The customer's phone number (this or `email` must be set)

FinishAddPasskeyRequest.description: Request to finish an add-passkey ceremony

FinishLoginRequest.description: Request to finish a login ceremony

FinishRegistrationRequest.description: Request to finish an invite-based registration ceremony

token.description: The invite token from the registration link

FullOrder.description: An order as shown to staff (includes contact data)

created_at.description: The point in time the order was placed

total_cents.description: Total over all positions in euro cents

FullOrderPosition.description: A position of an order as shown to staff

packed.description: Whether the position has been packed

price_cents.description: Price per unit in euro cents (snapshot at order time)

InviteResponse.description: Response to a created account or invite

registration_link.description: One-time link the new device opens to register its passkey

ItemRequest.description: Request to create or update an item

active.description: Whether the item is currently orderable

additional_info.description: Optional customer-facing details such as allergens or ingredients

category.description: The category the item belongs to

ItemUuid.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Item`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

ListPasskeysResponse.description: All passkeys of the current account

OrderItemUuid.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`OrderItem`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

OrderPositionRequest.description: A single position of an order request

OrderStatus.description:
Status of a pre-order

Allowed transitions: `Open -> Ready -> PickedUp`; `Open | Ready -> Cancelled`.

oneOf.description: Placed by the customer, not assembled yet

OrderUuid.description: Wrapper for the primary key of the [`Order`] model. To have better distinguishable types.

PasskeySchema.description: A passkey registered to the current account

created_at.description: The point in time this passkey was registered

last_used_at.description: The point in time this passkey was last used for a login

PublicCategory.description: A category as shown in the public shop

PublicItem.description: An orderable item as shown in the public shop

additional_info.description: Optional customer-facing details such as allergens or ingredients

category.description: The category the item belongs to

image_version.description: Cache-busting version of the item's image, unset if there is none

PublicOrder.description: An order as shown to the customer (no contact data echoed)

pickup_date.description: Pickup date (the Saturday after the order was placed)

total_cents.description: Total over all positions in euro cents

PublicOrderPosition.description: A position of an order as shown to the customer

price_cents.description: Price per unit in euro cents (snapshot at order time)

Role.description:
Role of a staff account

`Admin` implies all permissions of `Verkauf`.

oneOf.description: Manages items, prices, categories and staff accounts
Processes incoming pre-orders in the shop

SetItemImageRequest.description: Request to set an item's product photo

StartAddPasskeyResponse.description: Response to a started add-passkey ceremony (logged-in user, new device)

StartLoginRequest.description: Request to start a login ceremony

StartLoginResponse.description: Response to a started login ceremony

StartRegistrationRequest.description: Request to start an invite-based registration ceremony

token.description: The invite token from the registration link

username.description: The username the passkey will be registered for

UpdateAccountRequest.description: Request to update a staff account
